text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oh no, now I've done it...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
My, my! What's wrong? Feeling down?<n>Maybe you
need a little treat?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
No, it's not that. I was doing some dance<n>practice
on my own just now...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
But I got too into it and ended up<n>tearing a hole
through the dance studio<n>wall!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
You did?! Wow! What happened? Did<n>you punch
it?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
No... You know that dance with the<n>kicking
moves? I was doing that, then<n>bam! Leg went
right through!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I've apologized, but as a princess, this is<n>most
disgraceful!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, the legs I worked so hard to train<n>have
betrayed me!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry about it! The wall took some<n>damage,
but it's not a bad thing to be<n>strong! ☆ Let's eat
looots of food and<n>cheer you up!
